title: Whitehorse (Yukon) - Canada.ca
content:
Located on the traditional territory of the Kwanlin Dün First Nation and the Ta’an Kwäch’än Council, Whitehorse has some of the most beautiful landscapes in the country. In addition to its wide open spaces, northern lights, lakes and mountains, this city is home to warm and welcoming people.
Where is Whitehorse?

## Watch: Living in Whitehorse
Learn more about the community.
No endorsement of any products or services is expressed or implied.
Current position: 00:00:00

This video is also available in HD on YouTube where you can leave a comment, share it on your social network or embed it into your site.
Listen to the experience of two immigrants and their arrival in their new community.
“Anyone in any field would be able to find something in the Yukon. The territory is developing steadily, so there are lots of opportunities.” – Virginie
